contentRules: Player-facing pages should answer the query naturally without saying SEO, GEO, search intent, or keyword strategy.
Use Meowdoku prominently in titles and headings, but keep body copy readable.
Each page should link to play, rules, strategy, levels, related names, and language pages where relevant.
Question headings should sound like real player questions.
Variant pages should explain alternate names as helpful navigation, not as keyword targeting.
Every supported language must have saved keyword terms and ChatGPT-style question clusters before page generation.
Generated localized pages should include the saved terms and questions for that language, not only translated generic page text.
